description: Quotes shown on startup. Mix of tech, motivational, and wisdom.

quotes.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
quotes.author: John Johnson

quotes.text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
quotes.author: Martin Fowler

quotes.text: The best way to predict the future is to implement it.
quotes.author: David Heinemeier Hansson

quotes.text: Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.
quotes.author: Austin Freeman

quotes.text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
quotes.author: Kent Beck

quotes.text: Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it's bad.
quotes.author: Cory House

quotes.text: Perfection is achieved not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.text: The only way to learn a new programming language is by writing programs in it.
quotes.author: Dennis Ritchie

quotes.text: Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
quotes.author: Harold Abelson

quotes.text: The most dangerous phrase in the language is 'We've always done it this way.'
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: It's not a bug — it's an undocumented feature.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: Measuring programming progress by lines of code is like measuring aircraft building progress by weight.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: The computer was born to solve problems that did not exist before.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: One machine can do the work of fifty ordinary men. No machine can do the work of one extraordinary man.
quotes.author: Elbert Hubbard

quotes.text: The function of good software is to make the complex appear to be simple.
quotes.author: Grady Booch

quotes.text: Before software can be reusable it first has to be usable.
quotes.author: Ralph Johnson

quotes.text: In theory, there is no difference between theory and practice. But in practice, there is.
quotes.author: Jan L. A. van de Snepscheut

quotes.text: A ship in harbor is safe, but that is not what ships are built for.
quotes.author: John A. Shedd

quotes.text: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.text: Done is better than perfect.
quotes.author: Sheryl Sandberg

quotes.text: If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The only real mistake is the one from which we learn nothing.
quotes.author: Henry Ford

quotes.text: Weeks of coding can save you hours of planning.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: It works on my machine.
quotes.author: Every Developer Ever

quotes.text: There are only two hard things in computer science: cache invalidation and naming things.
quotes.author: Phil Karlton

quotes.text: Unix is simple. It just takes a genius to understand its simplicity.
quotes.author: Dennis Ritchie

quotes.text: Linux is only free if your time has no value.
quotes.author: Jamie Zawinski

quotes.text: With great power comes great responsibility. And also great error logs.
quotes.author: Anonymous

quotes.text: If debugging is the process of removing bugs, then programming must be the process of putting them in.
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: Deleted code is debugged code.
quotes.author: Jeff Sickel

quotes.text: It's harder to read code than to write it.
quotes.author: Joel Spolsky

quotes.text: You can't have great software without a great team.
quotes.author: Jim McCarthy

quotes.text: Everybody should learn to program a computer because it teaches you how to think.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt
